title: The Big Bang
description: The universe began from an extremely hot and dense singularity, expanding rapidly and creating space, time, matter, and energy.

title: First Stars Form
description: Hydrogen and helium clouds collapsed under gravity, igniting the first stars and bringing light to the universe.

title: Milky Way Formation
description: The Milky Way galaxy began forming through mergers of smaller galaxies and large clouds of gas.

title: Solar System Formation
description: A giant molecular cloud collapsed, forming the Sun and the planets that orbit it today.

title: Earth Forms
description: The Earth formed from dust and rock particles within the protoplanetary disk surrounding the young Sun.

title: Moon Formation
description: A Mars-sized object collided with Earth, ejecting debris that eventually formed the Moon.

title: First Life Appears
description: Simple microscopic life emerged in Earth's oceans, marking the beginning of biological evolution.

title: First Human in Space
description: Yuri Gagarin became the first human to travel into space aboard Vostok 1.

title: Apollo 11 Moon Landing
description: Humans landed on the Moon for the first time as Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin walked on the lunar surface.

title: Hubble Space Telescope
description: The Hubble Space Telescope was launched, revolutionizing astronomy with unprecedented observations.

title: International Space Station
description: Construction of the International Space Station began, creating a permanent human presence in orbit.

title: James Webb Space Telescope
description: The James Webb Space Telescope launched to observe the earliest galaxies and study distant worlds.

title: Human Mars Missions
description: Future missions aim to land humans on Mars and establish a long-term presence on the Red Planet.

title: Interstellar Exploration
description: Advanced spacecraft may travel beyond our solar system to explore nearby star systems.
